Kejohanan Taekwondo Jemputan RSB 2025

A huge congratulations to our athletes for representing our MMU Taekwondo Club in Kejohana Taekwondo Jemputan RSB 2025 at Arena Badminton Perak, Ipoh. 

Below are the achievements achieved by our athletes:
Gan Sheng Cheng (Kyorugi - Bantam Weight) - 1 Silver
Haariesh A/L Mageswaran (Kyorugi - Fin Weight) - 1 Bronze

Feel free to come join us at our booth for CSRW! 

Newcomers or those that have previous experience are welcomed to join us. All styles are welcome! 

Date:10th April 2025
Time:10 AM - 6 PM
Venue: CLC Concourse
Registration Fee: Rm10

Character Development Taekwondo Sports Carnival - 17th June 2023

Credits to our Photographer @schneiderooi for the great photos

Greetings!

The MMU Taekwondo club is officially inviting you to join the Annual General Meeting 23/24! 

Details of the AGM are as below:
Date: 9/11/2023
Time: 8-10PM
Venue: MSMX 0001 (A1)

Please take note that the attendance of all taekwondo club members are compulsory and that there will be *no training* due to the AGM.

See you there!

Congratulations to our MMU athlete and MMUTKD President CHUNG YOU JING for the achievements at the Olympic Day: Malaysia Sports Festival 2023.

Silver - U30 Male Individual Poomsae
Bronze - U30 Male Team Poomsae

~ MMUTKD

Pahang Open Taekwondo Championship 2023

Gratitudes to our athletes for representing MMU in the most recent Pahang Open held in Dewan Kompleks Bandaraya, Kuantan Pahang from the 25th-26th November 2023.

Below are the achievements of our athletes:

Chung You Jing - 1 Silver 1 Bronze (Poomsae)
Ali Hussain S Almuslim - 1 Bronze (Kyorugi)
Gary Ho Shao Wen - Participation (Kyorugi)
